'''dhajasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantioseparation|enantioseparation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantioseparation|enantioseparation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhajasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæjæshæth|dhæjæshæth]] || [[word:dhæjæshæj|dhæjæshæj]] || [[word:dhæjæshæsh|dhæjæshæsh]] || [[word:dhæjæshæ|dhæjæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajajashath|dhajajashath]] || [[word:dhajajashaj|dhajajashaj]] || [[word:dhajajashash|dhajajashash]] || [[word:dhajajasha|dhajajasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajashath|dhajashath]] || [[word:dhajashaj|dhajashaj]] || [[word:dhajashash|dhajashash]] || [[word:dhajasha|dhajasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajafshath|dhajafshath]] || [[word:dhajafshaj|dhajafshaj]] || [[word:dhajafshash|dhajafshash]] || [[word:dhajafshaf|dhajafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhajashatha|dhajashatha]] || [[word:dhajashaja|dhajashaja]] || [[word:dhajashasha|dhajashasha]] || [[word:dhajashaka|dhajashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhajashath|dhajashath]] || [[word:dhajashaj|dhajashaj]] || [[word:dhajashash|dhajashash]] || [[word:dhajasha|dhajasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhajashathal|dhajashathal]] || [[word:dhajashajal|dhajashajal]] || [[word:dhajashashal|dhajashashal]] || [[word:dhajashakal|dhajashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhajashathatha|dhajashathatha]] || [[word:dhajashajaja|dhajashajaja]] || [[word:dhajashashasha|dhajashashasha]] || [[word:dhajashaka|dhajashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhajashathan|dhajashathan]] || [[word:dhajashajan|dhajashajan]] || [[word:dhajashashan|dhajashashan]] || [[word:dhajashakan|dhajashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhajashathaoro|dhajashathaoro]] || [[word:dhajashajaoro|dhajashajaoro]] || [[word:dhajashashaoro|dhajashashaoro]] || [[word:dhajashakaoro|dhajashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
